tagline: Family Owned · Licensed & Insured · Baltimore, MD
headline: Plumbing Services in Baltimore, MD — Done Right the First Time
subheadline: Abbott Brothers is a small, family-run plumbing company providing high-quality residential and commercial services throughout Baltimore City and surrounding counties. We charge a flat $69 service call, stand behind every repair, and put your time first.
service_descriptions: Fixture repairs, pipe replacements, leak detection, and full system renovations — backed by our 1-year warranty.
Installation and repair of tank and tankless water heaters. Free estimates on replacements with same-day availability when possible.
From everyday kitchen and bathroom clogs to full sewer line replacements, we clear the blockage fast and diagnose the root cause.
Boiler and heating system repairs and maintenance to keep your home warm through Baltimore winters.
Old galvanized, corroded, or burst pipes replaced efficiently with minimal disruption — from small sections to full re-pipes.
Fast dispatch, proper licensing, and the same upfront pricing for commercial properties throughout Baltimore metro.

reviews.text: I've been burned by big plumbing companies charging $300 just to show up. Abbott Brothers charged $69, diagnosed a cracked drain pipe, and quoted me fairly to fix it. Clean work, honest pricing — they've earned every future job at my house.
Used the military discount for a water heater install. The tech was on time, explained the options clearly, and had it running in two hours. The 1-year warranty gives real peace of mind.

Had a nasty sewer backup on a Saturday morning. Abbott Brothers picked up, showed up within two hours, and cleared the whole main line. Didn't try to upsell me or scare me into unnecessary work. Refreshingly straightforward.

issues_addressed: Site lacks two-tier header with utility bar (phone, reviews, discounts) like the real site
Hero needed diagonal red-to-gold color treatment matching actual brand palette
Maryland/local identity (badge logo with state flag colors) not represented
Needed two-column hero with conversion card for desktop visitors
